name: Total Skin Revision
desc: A 120-minute deep-dive facial with Vicki — full skin analysis, customised actives, extractions, and a bespoke finishing protocol.

name: New Client Assessment Facial
desc: First-visit skin assessment with a targeted facial. The mandatory entry point for new clients — establishes baseline, home-care plan, and treatment pathway.

name: The Sculpt Artisté
desc: Signature sculpting facial combining manual lifting techniques, lymphatic work and depuffing. Optional Dermaplaning add-on.

name: The Dream Facial
desc: Relaxing 60-minute signature facial — cleanse, exfoliation, extractions, mask, massage, finishing serums.

name: Ultimate Hydrafacial
desc: 90-minute premium Hydrafacial with boosters, LED therapy and lymphatic drainage.

name: Platinum Hydrafacial
desc: 60-minute Hydrafacial with booster of choice and LED therapy.

name: Express Hydrafacial
desc: 30-minute on-the-go Hydrafacial. Perfect for lunchtime refresh.

name: Ultimate Glo2Facial
desc: 90-minute Glo2 treatment combining capsule oxygen exfoliation with ultrasound and LED.

name: Chocolate Covered Berries Facial
desc: Antioxidant-rich seasonal facial with cocoa and berry enzyme peel — a restorative, radiance-driven ritual.

name: Express Facial
desc: 30-minute refreshing facial for maintenance between signature treatments.

name: Face Reality Acne Bootcamp Consultation
desc: Mandatory first step for the Face Reality acne programme. Skin analysis, home-care plan, and personalised regimen for 90-day clearing.

name: Lash Lift & Tint
desc: A keratin lash lift plus tint — eye-opening lift that lasts 6–8 weeks.

name: Eyebrow Wax
desc: Precision eyebrow shaping to suit your face structure.

name: Eyebrow Tint
desc: Semi-permanent brow tint for fuller, defined brows — lasts 4–6 weeks.

name: Eyelash Tint
desc: Darkens natural lashes for a no-mascara look — lasts 4–6 weeks.

name: Dermaplaning Add-On
desc: Remove peach fuzz and dead skin for a glass-finish base. Add to any facial.
